title: QCAA HW1 Problem 1
subtitle: Data reuploading regression viewer
description: This static export reuses the latest saved repository artifacts. The UI is ready for step-by-step replay once trajectory snapshots are exported from training.

experiment.task: Regression on f(x1, x2) = sin(exp(x1) + x2)
